# Conway Connects

> Conway Connects provides full-scope credit repair and business funding strategy for business owners. We dispute inaccurate items with all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) and secondary consumer reporting agencies (LexisNexis, Early Warning Services, ChexSystems, Innovis), following up aggressively until items are removed or corrected — then help clients execute personal and business funding sequences to access $50K–$250K in capital using OPM.

## About

Conway Connects was founded by Jonathan Jason Weaver-Conway. The company specializes in credit repair under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), and business funding solutions for entrepreneurs and small business owners. Our ICP is business owners who need credit repaired to get funded.

## Services

- **Full-Scope Credit Repair:** Dispute inaccurate items across Equifax, Experian, TransUnion, LexisNexis, Early Warning Services, ChexSystems, and Innovis. Average 40-point improvement in 4–6 months. Aggressive follow-up until items are removed or corrected.
- **Business Funding Strategy:** Personal and business funding sequence planning, business credit profile setup, credit stacking, lender network access, and application collaboration so approvals happen. $50K–$250K in capital.
- **Credit Education:** CreditCoach.Club — credit coaching and education for business owners ready to learn the funding game.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://conwayconnects.com
- Free Credit Audit: https://conwayconnects.com/#audit
- Credit Course: https://creditcoach.club

## Audience

Business owners and entrepreneurs who need damaged credit repaired across all bureaus and secondary agencies so they can access business funding and leverage OPM confidently.
